subject: Bump up nbi version for OOM
commit_message:
Bump up nbi version for OOM

Update version to 3.0.2
Fix 2 medium bugs EXTAPI-164 & EXTAPI-172
https://jira.onap.org/browse/EXTAPI-164
https://jira.onap.org/browse/EXTAPI-172

Change-Id: Ifb9819634d8a56703e3ccd401b6544a2283f3f91
Issue-ID: EXTAPI-179
Signed-off-by: MatthieuGeerebaert <matthieu.geerebaert@orange.com>

Reviewing/verifying on one of my casablanca clusters - don't merge until both helm deploy (plus kubectl get pods --all-namespaces) and robot healthcheck pass - the job of the upcoming CD system in TSC-25 - or if developers run this themselves and post

236  cd kubernetes/
